title: Spain's Lopez set to miss World Cup with foot fracture
summary: Spain midfielder Fermin Lopez is expected to miss this summer's World Cup due to a foot fracture sustained while playing for Barcelona. The injury represents a significant blow to Spain's squad depth ahead of the tournament.
content: Spain midfielder Fermin Lopez is expected to miss this summer's World Cup because of a foot fracture he suffered while playing for Barcelona.

zh.title: 西班牙的洛佩斯因脚部骨折将缺席世界杯
zh.summary: 西班牙中场球员费尔明·洛佩斯因在巴塞罗那效力期间遭受的脚部骨折，预计将缺席今年夏天的世界杯。这次伤病对西班牙队在赛前的阵容深度造成了重大打击。

title: Carvajal to leave Real Madrid after 23 years
summary: Real Madrid captain Dani Carvajal will depart the club at the end of the season, concluding two separate spells spanning 23 years at Santiago Bernabeu. His departure marks the end of an era for the Spanish club.
content: Real Madrid captain Dani Carvajal will leave the club at the end of this season after two spells at the Santiago Bernabeu covering 23 years.

zh.title: 卡瓦哈尔在效力皇马23年后即将离队
zh.summary: 皇马队长达尼·卡瓦哈尔将在赛季末离开俱乐部，结束他在伯纳乌球场两段合计23年的职业生涯。他的离队标志着这家西班牙俱乐部一个时代的终结。

title: How overperforming Villa returned to Champions League
summary: Aston Villa exceeded expectations by finishing eight places higher than predicted in the Premier League, becoming the league's most overperforming team. Their strong performance has secured a return to the Champions League.
content: Eight places better off than their expected position, Aston Villa are the highest overperforming team in the Premier League.

zh.title: 超额完成任务的阿斯顿维拉如何重返欧冠
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉超出预期，英超联赛最终排名比预测高出8位，成为英超表现最好的球队。他们的出色表现为球队赢得了重返欧冠的资格。

title: Who has the most Premier League assists in a season?
summary: BBC Sport examines the historical record for most assists delivered in a single Premier League season. The analysis identifies who holds this notable achievement in the league's history.
content: Our Ask Me Anything team look at who has provided the most assists in the history of the Premier League.

zh.title: 谁在一个赛季中获得了最多英超助攻？
zh.summary: BBC体育检查了在单个英超赛季中送出最多助攻的历史记录。分析确定了谁在联赛历史上保持这一显著成就。

title: Giroud, Azpilicueta and McCarthy join BBC World Cup team
summary: BBC Sport will broadcast all 104 matches of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, held across the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The coverage team includes former players Olivier Giroud, Cesar Azpilicueta, and James McCarthy.
content: BBC Sport announces its plans for the 2026 Fifa World Cup next month including coverage of all 104 matches in the United States, Canada and Mexico.

zh.title: 吉鲁、阿斯皮利奎塔和麦卡锡加入BBC世界杯转播团队
zh.summary: BBC体育将转播2026年FIFA世界杯的全部104场比赛，比赛将在美国、加拿大和墨西哥进行。转播团队包括前球员奥利维耶·吉鲁、塞萨尔·阿斯皮利奎塔和詹姆斯·麦卡锡。

title: Northampton Town appoint Hogg as manager
summary: Northampton Town has appointed Chris Hogg, former Norwich City assistant head coach, as their new manager on a two-year contract. The appointment aims to provide stability and direction for the club.
content: Northampton Town appoint former Norwich City assistant head coach Chris Hogg as their manager on a two-year contract.

zh.title: 北安普敦队任命霍格为主教练
zh.summary: 北安普敦队任命前诺里奇城助理主教练克里斯·霍格为新任主教练，合同期为两年。该任命旨在为俱乐部提供稳定性和方向。

title: No Celtic future talks before cup final for O'Neill
summary: Celtic manager Martin O'Neill does not expect discussions about his future before Saturday's Scottish Cup final and has expressed doubts about having the energy to continue in the role. The uncertainty surrounds the club's managerial position heading into the offseason.
content: Martin O'Neill does not expect there to be discussion about the Celtic manager's position before Saturday's Scottish Cup final, and doubts he would "have the energy" to continue.

zh.title: 欧尼尔在杯赛决赛前不会讨论凯尔特人的未来
zh.summary: 凯尔特人主教练马丁·欧尼尔不期待在周六苏格兰杯决赛前讨论自己的未来,并对继续担任这个角色是否有精力表示怀疑。这种不确定性围绕着球队在休赛期前的主教练位置。

title: West Ham relegation may cost London taxpayers £2.5m
summary: London taxpayers could face an additional £2.5 million bill if West Ham are relegated from the Premier League, due to the club's lease agreement with London Stadium. The financial liability underscores the complex relationship between the club and its public investment.
content: London taxpayers may have to pay an extra £2.5m if West Ham are relegated from the Premier League, because of the club's lease agreement for London Stadium.

zh.title: 韦斯特汉降级可能让伦敦纳税人损失250万英镑
zh.summary: 如果韦斯特汉从英超降级,伦敦纳税人可能面临额外的250万英镑账单,这是由于该俱乐部与伦敦体育馆的租赁协议。这一财务责任强调了俱乐部与其公共投资之间的复杂关系。

title: Can you name every permanent Chelsea manager since Mourinho?
summary: Chelsea has appointed Xabi Alonso, former Liverpool midfielder, as their new manager on a four-year contract. The appointment represents a significant managerial change for the club.
content: Chelsea have appointed former Liverpool midfielder Xabi Alonso as their manager on a four‑year contract.

zh.title: 你能说出穆里尼奥之后每一位切尔西常任主教练的名字吗?
zh.summary: 切尔西任命前利物浦中场球员哈维·阿隆索为新主教练,合同期为四年。这一任命代表了俱乐部主教练位置的重大变化。

title: Livi set Friday deadline for head coach applicants
summary: Livingston has set a Friday closing date for applications for their new head coach position. Scott Arfield is currently in talks about a potential player-coach role with the Scottish club.
content: Livingston set a closing date of Friday for applications to be their new head coach and say Scott Arfield is in talks over a player-coach role.

zh.title: 利文斯顿为主教练申请人设定周五截止日期
zh.summary: 利文斯顿为其新主教练职位的申请设定了周五的截止日期。斯科特·阿菲尔德目前正在与这家苏格兰俱乐部谈判一个潜在的球员兼教练角色。

title: Who has qualified for next season's Champions League?
summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team provides an overview of teams that have already qualified for the 2026-27 Champions League season. The analysis clarifies the competitive landscape heading into next season.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains which teams have already qualified for the 2026-27 edition of the Champions League.

zh.title: 谁已获得下赛季欧冠资格？
zh.summary: BBC体育的"问我任何事"团队概述了已经获得2026-27赛季欧冠资格的球队。该分析澄清了下赛季的竞争格局。

title: Town of 13,000 people spawns a Bundesliga team
summary: Elversberg has secured promotion to the Bundesliga, becoming one of the smallest towns ever to have a top-flight German football club. The achievement represents a remarkable success story for the modest-sized community.
content: Elversberg will become one of the smallest clubs ever to play in the Bundesliga after securing a first promotion to Germany's top flight.

zh.title: 13000人的小镇诞生一支德甲球队
zh.summary: 埃尔费斯贝格已确保升入德甲，成为有史以来拥有德国顶级足球俱乐部的最小城镇之一。这一成就代表了这个中等规模社区的杰出成功故事。

title: Podcast: Title race debrief - is Scottish football at a turning point?
summary: Celtic won the Scottish football title in a final-day decider, raising questions about the future direction of Scottish football. The podcast explores whether this moment represents a turning point for the league.
content: Celtic are champions after a final-day decider - where now for Scottish football?

zh.title: 播客：冠军争夺赛后总结 - 苏格兰足球是否处于转折点？
zh.summary: 凯尔特人队在最后一天的决赛中赢得苏格兰足球冠军，引发了对苏格兰足球未来方向的疑问。播客探讨了这一时刻是否代表苏格兰足球联赛的转折点。

title: O'Neill urges Celtic to move quick on manager - gossip
summary: Following Celtic's title win, there are discussions about managerial decisions at the club, the impact on Hearts after their title loss, and transfer news involving an Aberdeen defender.
content: Celtic manager's advice to club, Hearts boss on title pain and Aberdeen defender linked with move.

zh.title: 奥尼尔敦促凯尔特人快速做出主教练决定 - 花边新闻
zh.summary: 在凯尔特人队赢得冠军后，有关该俱乐部教练决定的讨论，哈茨队失利后的影响，以及涉及阿伯丁后卫的转会新闻。

title: Stories, scheduling & spectacle - five takeaways from 2025-26 WSL
summary: As the 2025-26 Women's Super League season concludes, BBC Sport examines five key questions and takeaways that defined the campaign. The analysis covers major themes and trends from the women's football season.
content: With the 2025-26 season in the books, BBC Sport answers five pertinent questions from the Women's Super League.

zh.title: 故事、赛程与盛典 - 2025-26 WSL 五大看点
zh.summary: 随着2025-26女超级联赛赛季结束，BBC体育梳理了定义本赛季的五个关键看点。分析涵盖了女子足球赛季的主要主题和趋势。

title: Selfish Salah should be dropped from Anfield finale - Rooney
summary: Wayne Rooney has criticized Mohamed Salah's recent public complaints about Liverpool, suggesting the forward should be benched for the season finale. The controversy highlights tensions within the club as the season concludes.
content: Mohamed Salah should be dropped from Liverpool's season finale for 'selfish' criticism of Liverpool, says Wayne Rooney.

zh.title: 自私的萨拉赫应被除名 - 鲁尼评利物浦赛季收官
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼批评了穆罕默德·萨拉赫最近对利物浦的公开抱怨，建议这位前锋应该在赛季最后一场比赛中被换下。这场争议凸显了俱乐部在赛季结束时的内部紧张局势。
